$comment: Canonical KC2 fixture — Drawings × all 5 entity structures. Captured at production mini-Gauntlet 2026-06-25T10:59:03Z against fano-engine-00032-qan (Rev 27 iter11.B). This is the **load-bearing entity-polarity demonstration**: the firewall's empirical `allowed_organisation` table for sbrm_3140 surfaces opposite polarity than canonical-taxonomy expectation. The deployed Prolog firewall is the wire-truth.

load_bearing_lesson.summary: Data-truth (production-corpus silver-tier code) vs taxonomy-truth (canonical YAML allowed_organisation table) can disagree; both surface side-by-side via predicted_code vs fano_status
load_bearing_lesson.implication_for_consumer: Do NOT discard draft_fact rows as 'model error'. They are firewall-quarantined rows surfacing a polysemy that needs operator review.

company.operator_review_action: Operator inspects whether company-Drawings should route to sbrm_3140 (Equity > Company Drawings; firewall says no) OR an alternative equity code; firewall surfaces both possibilities

trust.operator_review_action: Auto-accepted; trust-Drawings is silver-tier dominantly Liability > Trust > Beneficiary Drawings (sbrm_2240)

partnership.operator_review_action: Auto-accepted; partnership-Drawings is allowed_organisation(sbrm_3140, partnership) per deployed Prolog firewall

sole_trader.operator_review_action: Auto-accepted; sole_trader-Drawings is allowed_organisation(sbrm_3140, sole_trader) per deployed Prolog firewall (note: canonical-taxonomy intent assumed sbrm_3145 here; empirical wire-truth differs — see L#64 PROMOTED)

super_fund.operator_review_action: Operator inspects whether super_fund-Drawings should route to sbrm_3140 (firewall says no) OR an alternative member-equity code; firewall surfaces both possibilities

consumer_implementation_pattern.summary: When fano_status=draft_fact, route the row to operator-review queue. Do NOT auto-post to GL. Surface (predicted_code, cascade_topology, quarantine_reason) side-by-side with the source CoA's (operator_hint_predicted_code, operator_hint_source_topology).
consumer_implementation_pattern.reference: See examples/demo-gui/ for a working browser-side reference implementation
